title: Full WCAG 2.2 AA + offline verification + independent >=10% accuracy spot-check + learner-pilot runbook
context: Pilot readiness requires the practice surface and exports to fully meet WCAG 2.2 AA, offline to be verified end-to-end, an independent accuracy spot-check to pass, and a learner-pilot runbook so a partner can run a cohort with an anonymous outcome survey.
objective: Verify full WCAG 2.2 AA + offline, pass an independent >=10% accuracy spot-check, and write the learner-pilot onboarding runbook.
acceptanceCriteria: Practice surface + exports meet WCAG 2.2 AA; offline verified end-to-end
Independent >= 10% accuracy spot-check passes (0 errors; any found blocks release)
Learner-pilot onboarding runbook written (how a partner runs a cohort, anonymous outcome survey included)
